'''shanunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdellion|bdellion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdellion|bdellion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shanunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæninith|shæninith]] || [[word:shæninij|shæninij]] || [[word:shæninish|shæninish]] || [[word:shænini|shænini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shanununuth|shanununuth]] || [[word:shanununuj|shanununuj]] || [[word:shanununush|shanununush]] || [[word:shanununu|shanununu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanunuth|shanunuth]] || [[word:shanunuj|shanunuj]] || [[word:shanunush|shanunush]] || [[word:shanunu|shanunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanufnuth|shanufnuth]] || [[word:shanufnuj|shanufnuj]] || [[word:shanufnush|shanufnush]] || [[word:shanufnuf|shanufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shanunuthu|shanunuthu]] || [[word:shanunuju|shanunuju]] || [[word:shanunushu|shanunushu]] || [[word:shanunuku|shanunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shanunuth|shanunuth]] || [[word:shanunuj|shanunuj]] || [[word:shanunush|shanunush]] || [[word:shanunu|shanunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shanunuthul|shanunuthul]] || [[word:shanunujul|shanunujul]] || [[word:shanunushul|shanunushul]] || [[word:shanunukul|shanunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shanunuthuthu|shanunuthuthu]] || [[word:shanunujuju|shanunujuju]] || [[word:shanunushushu|shanunushushu]] || [[word:shanunuku|shanunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shanunuthun|shanunuthun]] || [[word:shanunujun|shanunujun]] || [[word:shanunushun|shanunushun]] || [[word:shanunukun|shanunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shanunuthuoro|shanunuthuoro]] || [[word:shanunujuoro|shanunujuoro]] || [[word:shanunushuoro|shanunushuoro]] || [[word:shanunukuoro|shanunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
